title: Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba
posterAlt: Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba (2024) movie poster
tmdbOverview: While evading the cops in Agra, Rani and Rishu scheme to run away together. But when their plans go awry, Rani asks a mild-mannered admirer for help.
synopsis: Released in 2024, Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba is a mystery, thriller and romance film from India. It has a 5.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 19 certification (KR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
